rationale: The citing paper focuses on inspirational vs. deal-oriented in-store communication and a goal-completion mechanism, while the cited paper is about delayed cashback payments in online cashback platforms, so the topical overlap appears to be only broad promotion literature. However, the available match evidence is just a DOI entry with no in-text citation context, so we cannot confirm whether it is merely incidental or used as a meaningful comparison/foundation. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop outright.
